modeSelect.subtitle: How do you want to play?
modeSelect.localDesc: Play vs AI or pass-and-play with a friend on the same device.
modeSelect.multiplayerDesc: Challenge a friend remotely — no server needed.

classic.title: Classic
classic.description: The traditional chess game with all its classic rules.

borderless.title: Borderless
borderless.description: Pieces can cross the edges of the board, creating unique strategic possibilities.

all-random.title: All Random
all-random.description: Pieces are randomly placed at the start, creating a unique experience every time.

assimilation.title: Assimilation
assimilation.description: When a piece captures another, it permanently acquires its movement abilities.

p2p.shareQrOrLink: Share this QR code or link
p2p.inviteText: Join me for a {{mode}} game on ChessVerse!

gameOver.opponentLeft: Opponent returned to the main menu.

learning.hintButtonDesc: Show a hint button during your turn

tactics.discoveredCheckDesc: Moving a piece revealed an attack on the king
tactics.forkDesc: One piece attacks two pieces at once
tactics.pinDesc: A piece is pinned to the king
tactics.promotionDesc: A pawn reaches the last rank

learning.moveAnnotationsDesc: Show tactical labels after each move

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.note: This will open your email client with the message pre-filled.

mentions.title: Legal Notice
mentions.ipBody1: All content on this site (source code, design, text, graphics) is the exclusive property of Jérémy Maisse, except third-party elements explicitly mentioned. Any reproduction, distribution or use without prior written authorization is prohibited.
mentions.ipBody2: The chess engine used is Stockfish, distributed under the GPLv3 licence. The peer-to-peer connectivity library is Trystero, under the MIT licence.
mentions.liabilityBody: ChessVerse is provided free of charge and without guarantee of continuous availability. The publisher cannot be held responsible for service interruptions, bugs or data loss related to the use of the site.
mentions.lawBody: This site is subject to French law. Any dispute relating to its use falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Nice, France.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Jérémy Maisse, publisher of ChessVerse, is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy describes the data collected, its purpose and your rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR – EU 2016/679) and French data protection law.
privacy.dataBody1: ChessVerse collects no personally identifiable data: no account, no registration, no name, no email address.
privacy.dataBody2: The only data processed are anonymous usage statistics via Google Analytics 4 (GA4), integrated through Google Tag Manager:
dataItems: Type and mode of game started
Duration and number of moves in a game
Aggregated technical data: device type, browser, country (region/country level only)
privacy.dataBody3: This data does not allow identification of an individual. No data is combined with advertising information or third-party profiles.
privacy.purposeBody: The statistics collected are used solely to improve the gaming experience: understanding the most-used modes, detecting potential technical issues and guiding future developments.
privacy.basisBody: Processing is based on the legitimate interest of the publisher (service improvement), the data being strictly anonymous and not used for advertising or commercial purposes. Google's Consent Mode is configured with analytics_storage: granted and all advertising signals disabled (ad_storage: denied).
privacy.cookiesBody1: ChessVerse uses browser local storage (localStorage) to remember your game preferences (AI difficulty, board orientation, interface language). This data remains in your browser and is never transmitted to our servers.
privacy.cookiesBody2: Google Analytics 4 may set technical cookies for anonymous audience measurement. No advertising or personalisation cookies are used.
privacy.p2pBody: In multiplayer mode, the connection between players is established peer-to-peer via WebRTC (Trystero library). Game data travels directly between players' browsers, without passing through our servers. No games are recorded.
privacy.processorsBody: These sub-processors are located outside the European Union. Transfers are governed by the European Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses.
privacy.retentionBody: Analytics data is retained for 14 months in Google Analytics, in line with the platform's default settings. Preferences stored in localStorage persist until manually cleared from your browser.
privacy.rightsBody1: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights over your personal data: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection.
privacy.rightsBody2: Since ChessVerse collects no data that could identify you, it is not possible to locate and associate analytics data with your person.
privacy.rightsCnil: You may also file a complaint with the

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use (ToU) govern access to and use of the ChessVerse service, published by Jérémy Maisse, sole trader (SIRET: 928 825 322 00011).
terms.accessBody1: ChessVerse is a free chess web application, accessible without registration or account. It offers local game modes against AI and peer-to-peer multiplayer. Access to the service is free of charge.
terms.accessBody2: The publisher reserves the right to modify, suspend or discontinue the service at any time without notice or compensation.
terms.useIntro: The user agrees to use ChessVerse in good faith and in accordance with these Terms of Use.
useItems: Any attempt to circumvent, decompile or exploit the service abusively;
Use of the service for unlawful purposes contrary to public order;
Any action likely to disrupt the proper functioning of the service or peer-to-peer connections;
Use of bots or automated programs to manipulate games.
terms.p2pBody1: Multiplayer mode relies on a direct browser-to-browser connection (WebRTC / peer-to-peer). The publisher is not party to exchanges between players and disclaims any responsibility for the behaviour of users towards each other.
terms.p2pBody2: No conversation, message or game data passes through the publisher's servers.
terms.ipBody: All elements of ChessVerse — source code, design, graphics, name — are the exclusive property of Jérémy Maisse, except duly identified third-party elements (Stockfish under GPLv3, Trystero under MIT). Any unauthorised reproduction, representation, modification or exploitation is prohibited and constitutes infringement under French intellectual property law.
terms.liabilityIntro: ChessVerse is provided "as is" without any guarantee of accuracy, continuity or freedom from bugs. The publisher cannot be held responsible for:
liabilityItems: Loss of games or game data;
Peer-to-peer connection issues related to users' network infrastructure;
Any indirect damage related to use of the service.
terms.changesBody: The publisher reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on the site. Continued use of the service after modification constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.lawBody: These Terms are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and in the absence of amicable resolution, the competent courts of Nice shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
